tagline: A production-grade multi-agent platform that plans, discovers, vets, tailors, submits, and tracks job applications — reasoning deliberately at every step.

phases.name: Foundations
phases.blurb: The reasoning substrate every agent stands on.

tasks.title: Orchestrator + 7 specialist agents
tasks.detail: Plan-and-execute state graph coordinating Discovery, Vetting, Resume, Peer-Critique, Submission, Tracking, Improvement.

tasks.title: BaseAgent reasoning loop
tasks.detail: Bounded deliberate → act → critique → decide with quality thresholds and refinement.

tasks.title: Append-only ReasoningTrace
tasks.detail: Every thought, tool call, self-critique and decision is auditable.

tasks.title: ThoughtBus pub/sub
tasks.detail: Thread-safe live thought streaming to the dashboard over WebSocket.

phases.name: Discovery
phases.blurb: Pluggable job sources with polite, rate-limited fetching.

tasks.title: JobSource protocol + adapters
tasks.detail: Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby public APIs, plus an offline FixtureSource.

tasks.title: Indeed RSS connector
tasks.detail: stdlib-only RSS parsing into normalized postings.

tasks.title: Local filters
tasks.detail: Salary, location, remote, veto-company gating before vetting.

tasks.title: Token-bucket rate limiter
tasks.detail: Wraps any HTTP client to stay polite to upstream ATS APIs.

phases.name: Vetting & Tailoring
phases.blurb: Score every posting, then build an evidence-cited resume.

tasks.title: Vetting scorecard
tasks.detail: Compensation, freshness, specificity and location-fit weighting.

tasks.title: Enrichers + tunable weights
tasks.detail: Glassdoor / Crunchbase / News / Layoffs heuristics into a user-tunable weighted score.

tasks.title: Evidence-cited resume builder
tasks.detail: Every bullet links to a real experience id — no hallucinated history.

tasks.title: Peer-critique agent
tasks.detail: Culture-alignment cosine scoring and ship/no-ship verdict.

tasks.title: JD parser + embeddings
tasks.detail: Keyword extraction and semantic matching for coverage scoring.

phases.name: Persistence & Dashboard
phases.blurb: A premium control surface with human-in-the-loop approval.

tasks.title: SQLite / Postgres TraceStore
tasks.detail: Durable persistence of plans, jobs, applications, documents and traces.

tasks.title: FastAPI dashboard + SPA
tasks.detail: Onboarding, live pipeline, Kanban, document viewer, trace stream.

tasks.title: One-click approval workflow
tasks.detail: Nothing is submitted without an explicit human ship decision.

tasks.title: Onboarding flow
tasks.detail: Profile, pasted-resume skill extraction, ATS handle capture.

phases.name: LLM Integration
phases.blurb: Optional real intelligence, fully offline by default.

tasks.title: Optional Anthropic SDK client
tasks.detail: Lazy-imported — the whole system runs offline with no SDK installed.

tasks.title: PII redaction
tasks.detail: Emails, phones, SSNs and cards masked before any log or LLM call.

tasks.title: Resume / critique callbacks
tasks.detail: Pluggable LLM hooks for bullet rewriting and summaries.

phases.name: Submission & Tracking
phases.blurb: Automate the apply, then watch the inbox for replies.

tasks.title: Greenhouse / Lever auto-submit
tasks.detail: Real multipart / JSON submission, gated behind human approval.

tasks.title: IMAP inbox watcher
tasks.detail: Confidence-scored classifier: reject / interview / assessment / offer.

tasks.title: Calendar-hint extraction
tasks.detail: Regex pull of Calendly / Zoom / datetime hints from replies.

tasks.title: Playwright autofill (Workday / iCIMS / generic)
tasks.detail: Driver-agnostic field mapper + registry, EEO/demographic questions always deferred to the human; 63 offline tests.

tasks.title: Gmail / Calendar OAuth
tasks.detail: Replace IMAP-only inbox with first-class Gmail + Calendar APIs.

phases.name: Intelligence & Experiments
phases.blurb: The system improves its own strategy over time.

tasks.title: A/B experiment framework
tasks.detail: Deterministic variant assignment with win / rollback significance logic.

tasks.title: Improvement meta-agent
tasks.detail: Surfaces rollbacks and promotes winning variants from the action log.

tasks.title: Structured JSON logging
tasks.detail: Pluggable sinks with PII redaction baked in.

tasks.title: Real paid enrichment APIs
tasks.detail: Swap heuristics for live Glassdoor / Crunchbase / news feeds.

tasks.title: pgvector embeddings
tasks.detail: Move embeddings from JSON columns to a real vector index.

phases.name: Hardening & Deploy
phases.blurb: From working build to operable service.

tasks.title: GitHub Actions CI
tasks.detail: pytest hard-blocking; ruff / mypy advisory.

tasks.title: GitHub Pages deploy (tracker + demo + app)
tasks.detail: Workflow assembles + publishes the tracker, cinematic demo and interactive app to a mobile-accessible static site.

tasks.title: Dockerfile + host deploy config
tasks.detail: Container + render.yaml + module-level ASGI app for one-click backend hosting.

tasks.title: mypy / ruff enforcement
tasks.detail: Configs exist in CI but are non-blocking — make them gate.

tasks.title: OpenTelemetry tracing
tasks.detail: Distributed traces across the agent pipeline.

tasks.title: Vault-backed secrets
tasks.detail: OAuth / IMAP tokens out of env and into a secret manager.

tasks.title: k8s manifests + autoscaling + SLOs
tasks.detail: Production runtime with horizontal scaling and service objectives.

tasks.title: Pen test + GDPR audit
tasks.detail: Security review and data-handling compliance pass.

phases.name: Demo & Repo
phases.blurb: Make it real, make it watchable.

tasks.title: Repo restructured around JobHunt
tasks.detail: Root README + pyproject now describe JobHunt; packaging via extras.

tasks.title: TradeBot parked in jargon/
tasks.detail: Unrelated project moved aside, history preserved, ready to dispose.

tasks.title: Cinematic demo (HTML + MP4)
tasks.detail: 8-scene animated 3D walkthrough, recorded to H.264.

tasks.title: Demo wired into dashboard
tasks.detail: Watch-demo + tracker entry points from the app shell; /demo, /tracker, /app routes on the live server.

tasks.title: Single-source-of-truth progress tracker
tasks.detail: This page — animated, interactive, deployed for mobile, rendering live from tasks.json.
